backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Hindi-to-English translation work across all pages (Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Gallery, Contact, Registration) with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files documenting the complete English translation of the Mount Paradise Public School website including routing, layout, pages, and forms.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space for educational design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mount Paradise Public School website with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Gallery, Contact, Registration) wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/forms/ContactFor: Contact form component with controlled inputs for name, email, phone, subject, and message with validation and toast notifications, all in English.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying school info, quick links, contact details (Dehri-on-Sone, Rohtas, Bihar), social media icons, office hours, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Responsive header with school logo and navigation menu featuring English labels (Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Student Registration, Gallery, Contact) for desktop and mobile with active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Layout wrapper component combining Header, main content area with Outlet, and Footer in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality with AuthClient, managing identity state and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for future React Query hooks to interact with backend methods.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom educational-themed color palette (deep blue primary, warm orange secondary, teal accent) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page showcasing Mount Paradise Public School's mission, vision, values, and core principles with hero section and feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/Academics.tsx: Academics page displaying curriculum information across primary, middle, and secondary education levels with tabbed interface and co-curricular activities.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Admissions page outlining the step-by-step admission process, required documents, and contact information for prospective students.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page component displaying school contact information (address, phone, email, office hours) in cards with icons and a ContactForm component for inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page component showing a grid of school images (building, classroom, library, bus, sports, cultural events) with dialog-based lightbox functionality for viewing full-size images.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with school introduction, feature cards highlighting quality education/teachers/facilities/values, and call-to-action buttons for admissions and learning more.
frontend/src/pages/Registration.tsx: Student registration page with a comprehensive multi-section form collecting student basic details, parent/guardian information, academic history, and address details with form validation and submission handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme with OKLCH color system, container settings, extended animations, border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting completed features for converting Mount Paradise Public School website content from Hindi to English across all pages and components.
